description: Backend OAuth integration endpoints for incremental Google service scopes and Spotify OAuth. Adds new API router at backend/app/api/integrations.py with endpoints for connecting/disconnecting Google services (Calendar, Tasks, Gmail, Slides) and Spotify. Stores granted scopes and tokens per user in Firestore. Also adds Spotify config to backend/app/config.py.
steps: Add SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID, SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET, and SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI to backend/app/config.py Settings class (with empty string defaults). Add GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI for the integrations callback.

Add 'connected_services' field (dict, default empty) and 'spotify_tokens' field (dict, default empty) to the User model in backend/app/db/models.py. The connected_services dict will map service names to their granted scopes and token data.

Create backend/app/api/integrations.py with these endpoints: (1) GET /api/integrations/connect/{service} - generates OAuth URL for a Google service (calendar, tasks, gmail, slides) with only that service's specific scopes, returns {auth_url: string}. (2) GET /api/integrations/callback - handles Google OAuth callback, stores access_token and granted scopes to user's connected_services in Firestore, then redirects to frontend settings page. (3) DELETE /api/integrations/disconnect/{service} - removes that service from connected_services in Firestore. (4) GET /api/integrations/status - returns dict of service_name -> {connected: bool, scopes: list}. (5) GET /api/integrations/spotify/auth-url - returns Spotify OAuth URL. (6) GET /api/integrations/spotify/callback - handles Spotify callback, stores token. (7) DELETE /api/integrations/spotify/disconnect - clears Spotify tokens. All endpoints require auth_token query param for user identification.

Scope mappings for the connect endpoint: calendar -> ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar'], tasks -> ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/tasks'], gmail -> ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.readonly', 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send'], slides -> ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/presentations', 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.file']
Register the integrations router in backend/app/main.py (import and include_router).
Run python -m py_compile backend/app/api/integrations.py and python -m py_compile backend/app/main.py to verify syntax.
acceptance_criteria: backend/app/config.py has SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID, SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET, SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI, GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI
backend/app/db/models.py User model has connected_services and spotify_tokens fields
backend/app/main.py imports and registers the integrations router
findings: All 4 files modified/created successfully. py_compile passes for all files. Router registered in main.py alongside existing routers.
